entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop being investigated for the peg drying problem.

entities.name: PEG DRYING
entities.description: A problem in groundnut characterized by stunted plants, mottled leaves, and blackened pegs and pods.

entities.name: STUNTED GROWTH
entities.description: Reduced plant height and overall growth associated with peg drying.

entities.name: MOTTLED LEAVES
entities.description: Discolored leaves associated with peg drying.

entities.name: BLACKENED PEGS AND PODS
entities.description: Darkening of the pegs and pods associated with peg drying.

entities.name: POT EXPERIMENT
entities.description: The experimental setup used to investigate the peg drying problem.

entities.name: DIBROMOCHLOROPROPANE
entities.description: A nematicide treatment used to investigate the cause of peg drying.

entities.name: VITAVAX
entities.description: A fungicide treatment (carboxin) used to investigate the cause of peg drying.

entities.name: BORIC ACID
entities.description: A boron application used to treat the peg drying problem.

entities.name: CALCIUM SULPHATE
entities.description: A calcium application used to treat the peg drying problem.

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The overall growth and development of the groundnut plant.

entities.name: ROOT MASS
entities.description: The total mass of the root system of the groundnut plant.

entities.name: NUMBER OF PEGS AND PODS
entities.description: The count of pegs and pods produced by the groundnut plant.

entities.name: POD FILLING
entities.description: The process of seed development within the groundnut pods.

entities.name: PHYTOTOXIC EFFECTS
entities.description: Harmful effects on plants caused by the fungicide Vitavax.
